This is a very long text that tests whether the embedding model handles long inputs correctly. Memra stores memories across three layers: L0 identity schema which requires triple approval for changes, L2 event log which captures episodic memories with time and place, and L3 verified facts which are long-term semantic memories. The scoring system uses a 3-axis weighted addition approach with relevance, freshness, and trust axes.
